classes.reasoning: This document is labeled 'eCRF MODULE' at the top and contains data capture fields for lipid panel and cardiovascular assessments including patient code, visit schedule, lab results, and injection site assessments. It is a structured form designed to collect per-patient, per-visit clinical data.

summary: This is an electronic Case Report Form (eCRF) module for collecting lipid panel and cardiovascular assessment data in study BIORCE-CAR-2024-007. The form captures primary lipid parameters (LDL-C, cholesterol, triglycerides, ApoB, Lp(a), PCSK9), hepatic safety panel results with enhanced monitoring per Amendment 1, and injection site reaction assessments across multiple visit timepoints.
